Title: Extraction II
Writer: Joe Russo, Ande Parks, Anthony Russo
Actors: Chris Hemsworth, Golshifteh Farahani, Adam Bessa
Plot: After barely surviving his grievous wounds from his mission in Dhaka, Bangladesh, Tyler Rake is back, and his team is ready to take on their next mission. Tasked with extracting a family who is at the mercy of a Georgian gangster, Tyler infiltrates one of the world's deadliest prisons in order to save them. But when the extraction gets hot, and the gangster dies in the heat of battle, his equally ruthless brother tracks down Rake and his team to Sydney, in order to get revenge.
Country: Czech Republic, Austria, Australia, United States, Spain, Germany, Canada, United Kingdom
